Package com.here.platform.data.client.impl

Class StreamPublishPartition

java.lang.Object
com.here.platform.data.client.impl.StreamPublishPartition
All Implemented Interfaces:
PublishPartition, Serializable, scala.Equals, scala.Product
public final class StreamPublishPartition extends Object implements PublishPartition, scala.Product, Serializable
internal stream publish with embedded data
